## Code Conventions

### Formatting Rules
- **Line Length**: Break long lines into multiple lines for readability
  - Class attributes in Svelte/HTML should be split across multiple lines when they exceed ~100 characters
  - Group related classes together on the same line
  - Always maintain proper indentation
  - Example:
    ```svelte
    <article 
        class="group relative bg-light-surface dark:bg-dark-surface 
            border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 
            rounded-2xl shadow-lg 
            transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1"
    >
    ```

- **Variables**: Describe your variable naming pattern
